title: Frontend Batch 33 - Public Detail Return-To Success Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced public Blog and Work detail delete success navigation for safe local returnTo values, unsafe protocol-relative returnTo rejection, and deterministic related page fallbacks.

validation.command: npx skills find nextjs returnTo navigation test url safety
validation.notes: Results were general/low-install Next.js navigation skills; no new skill was installed.

remainingGaps: Browser back/forward integration after public detail delete remains better suited to Playwright once Docker/backend e2e is available.
Public list create/edit success routing can receive a similar local return path sweep if more route-state gaps are found.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 34 - Public Admin Gate Session Failure Reinforcement.
